skills_and_achievements: classroom management; differentiated instruction; behavior modification; curriculum planning; AV/technology integration; counseling and family communication; public speaking and time management. Selected Head Teacher two consecutive years; Centerville Elementary Union Representative two years; Above and Beyond Award; Performing Arts Department Chair for three years; led after-school detention program reducing suspensions; mentored at-risk youth via Lincoln Challenge Academy; coached 8th-grade and 9th-grade boys basketball (head coach) and assistant varsity for seven years; helped 300+ students reach IEP goals.
